data.title: Prodalim Acquires Better Juice – a Patented Sugar Reduction Technology Enhancing Value Proposition Across Beverage and Confectionery Better-for-you Solutions
data.description: In the Netherlands, Prodalim, a key player in juice and specialty ingredients solutions, has recently acquired Better Juice, a pioneering food-tech company known for its expertise in natural sugar reduction technologies. This acquisition adds exclusive enzymatic capabilities to Prodalim’s offerings, enhancing their support for health-focused reformulation in beverages and related food segments. This move is set to benefit Prodalim in the global market for sugar reduction and taste modulation.

data.title: Cizzle Brands Corporation Recognized by UNFI Canada as One of the Fastest-Growing Brands in its Network; Appoints CPG Veteran David Giancoulos to Board of Directors
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has recently achieved significant milestones in its expansion efforts. The company, a leading sports nutrition brand in the health and wellness sector, has been recognized by UNFI Canada, a branch of United Natural Foods, Inc. (UNFI), as one of the fastest-growing brands within UNFI Canada’s supplier network. This recognition comes as Cizzle Brands continues to strengthen its presence in the market. One of the key products contributing to this growth is CWENCH Hydrat.

data.title: Emergent BioSolutions Receives Approval from Singapore Health Sciences Authority for Expanded Indication of ACAM2000® (Smallpox and Mpox (Vaccinia) Vaccine, Live) to Include Mpox
data.description: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on April 30, 2026, Emergent BioSolutions Inc. shared that Singapore’s Health Sciences Authority (HSA) granted approval for an expanded use of ACAM2000 ®. This includes safeguarding against mpox disease in adults at a high risk of infection. The vaccine, known for preventing Smallpox and Mpox (Vaccinia), Live, registered as NYSE: EBS, received this new indication, reinforcing its efficacy in protecting individuals at risk. This development marks a significant milestone in enhancing preventive measures, highlighting the importance of immunization in vulnerable populations.

data.title: Meitu Upgrades RoboNeo with Industry-First “Agent Teams” for Visual Content Creation
data.description: In Xiamen, China, on April 29, Meitu (1357.HK) unveiled a significant enhancement to its imaging AI assistant, RoboNeo. The update introduces an innovative "Agent Teams" structure for visual content development. This model forms an AI-driven creative team that delivers comprehensive services for creators, small groups, and individual entrepreneurs. By transitioning from single-task AI to Multi-Agent Orc, RoboNeo aims to tackle prevalent issues like disjointed workflows, excessive tool transitions, elevated expenses, and uniformity in content.

data.title: Intercontinental Exchange Approves Second Quarter Dividend of $0.52 per Share
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE), a top provider of financial market technology and data for global capital markets, has declared a dividend of $0.52 per share for the second quarter of 2026. This marks an 8% increase from the $0.48 per share dividend distributed in the second quarter of 2025. The cash dividend will be paid out on June 30, 2026, to stockholders who are recorded as of June 15, 2026. The ex-dividend date is also set for June 15, 2026.

data.title: Fora Named One of TIME100 Most Influential Companies 2026
data.description: A prominent travel agency known as Fora has recently earned recognition by being included in TIME's prestigious TIME100 Most Influential Companies list for 2026. This ranking recognizes companies that have demonstrated an outstanding influence on a global scale. Additionally, Fora was specifically acknowledged as a TIME100 Companies Industry Leader in the Travel sector for the same year. The recognition serves as a testament to the remarkable impact that Fora has made in the travel industry.

data.title: HI-VIEW RESOURCES COMMENCES TRADING ON AMERICA’S OTCQB MARKETPLACE UNDER “GXLDF”
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 30, 2026, Hi-View Resources Inc. (referred to as Hi-View or the Company) revealed that its common shares are now being traded on the OTCQB Venture Market under the symbol "GXLDF". This move (trading under CSE: GXLD; OTCQB: GXLDF; FSE: B630) is aimed at boosting visibility among U.S. investors and enhancing trading convenience for shareholders.
